name: Inspector Roofing Protocols
purpose: Provide a structured method for recording observable roof conditions, evidence quality, non-storm indicators, documentation defects, access limits, and follow-up actions.
privacy_rules: Do not include homeowner names in public examples.
Do not include policy or claim numbers in public examples.
Do not include exact residential addresses in public examples.
Do not publish dates of birth, certificate numbers, signatures, faces, or license plates.
Remove EXIF location metadata from public media.
Do not publish third-party reports without permission and documented redaction.
boundary: The protocol records observable conditions. It does not determine insurance coverage, payment, causation, code compliance, engineering conclusions, or legal rights. Inspector Roofing does not act as a public adjuster; carriers decide coverage, payment, and claim outcomes.

citations.title: Inspector Roofing Protocols software/source package record
